scripts.test: docker exec -e NODE_ENV=test factory-map-backend npx jest --runInBand --testTimeout=30000 --forceExit && docker exec factory-map-frontend sh -c "CI=true npm test -- --watchAll=false --passWithNoTests"
scripts.test:backend: docker exec -e NODE_ENV=test factory-map-backend npx jest --runInBand --testTimeout=30000 --forceExit
scripts.test:frontend: docker exec factory-map-frontend sh -c "CI=true npm test -- --watchAll=false --passWithNoTests"
scripts.seed: docker-compose exec backend npm run seed
